responses: Hello! I'm here to listen. How are you feeling today?
Hi there. How can I help you navigate your thoughts today?

patterns: I am having a panic attack
responses: I'm sorry you're feeling this way. Take a deep breath. Let's try a quick grounding exercise: name 3 things you can see right now.
Feeling overwhelmed is really tough. Remember to take it one moment at a time. I'm here for you.

patterns: I don't want to live anymore
responses: CRITICAL_OVERRIDE: Please know you are not alone. Reach out to a professional or a helpline immediately. You can call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) for free, 24/7 confidential support.
